description_long: This is a single open-toe heeled sandal featuring a medium-height block heel and a wide front strap. The strap is adorned with a woven herringbone pattern in neutral tones, bordered by light-colored trim. The insole appears cushioned and is a lighter shade, contrasting with the darker brown of the heel and sole. The heel and sole are solid and have a wood-like texture, providing both stability and style. Decorative rivets are visible on the sides where the strap meets the sole, adding a subtle metallic accent. The overall design is elegant and suitable for casual or semi-formal urban wear.
description: A brown open-toe heeled sandal with a woven front strap, block heel, and light trim, featuring decorative rivets and a cushioned insole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide woven strap, light trim, and open toe design.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the medium-height block heel, arch, and decorative rivets on the strap.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid block heel and the back of the insole.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full length of the sole, heel, and strap details.
